name: Hellish Heft
outcome: [AttackerName] slides her large clawed hands under her heavy bust, using them to squeeze, shake, and bounce her huge tits in front of [TargetName] in an alluringly eye catching display before letting them drop with one last captivating jiggle.
miss: [AttackerName] slides her large clawed hands under her heavy bust, using them to squeeze, shake, and bounce her huge tits, but [TargetName] looks away.
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s heart is left racing from the teasing sight of [AttackerName]'s bountiful tits! [TargetName] is charmed!
